tracks.rawText: 0:07[Rec] Apr 6 23:15:49Upload90s West Coast G-Funk, A high-pitched, portamento sine wave synth lead plays a melodic line over a heavy, laid-back groove, The bassline consists of a deep, resonant Moog-style synth with a slight filter envelope, playing syncopated sixteenth-note patterns, A clean, muted electric guitar performs rhythmic staccato scratches on the off-beats, The drum kit features a crisp, dry snare with a slight clap layer and a punchy kick drum, Tempo is 92 BPM, Key is G minor, 4/4 time signature, The arrangement features occasional orchestral string hits and a subtle, shimmering electric piano playing jazz-influenced chordsPublishRemix

tracks.rawText: 2:33El Hawa (feat. Ahmad Sleiman, Hayam Mansour) [hpHV2rXUgG0]UploadWorld fusion track blending Western chamber pop with Middle Eastern vocal traditions, The arrangement features a prominent string quartet providing rhythmic pizzicato and sustained legato counter-melodies, A clean-tone electric guitar plays arpeggiated figures, The percussion consists of a steady mid-tempo kick drum and a crisp snare on the backbeat, layered with subtle shakers, A female vocalist performs English lyrics with a breathy, operatic delivery, followed by a male vocalist performing melismatic Arabic chanting, The track is in the key of D minor at 100 BPM in 4/4 time4PublishRemix
tracks.title: El Hawa (feat. Ahmad Sleiman, Hayam Mansour) [hpHV2rXUgG0]

tracks.rawText: 3:57Ocean Flowv5.5Core sound: Genre-fluid sonic architecture blending reggae-dub, techno, electronic, and global rhythms, Built around groove, emotional impact, and cinematic atmosphere, designed for both dancefloor energy and deep listening experiences, Lyrics & mood: Hybrid storytelling that moves between introspection, sensuality, ambition, and transcendence, Hooks are immediate and memorable, often chant-driven, with a balance between poetic depth and viral simplicity, Production palette: Deep sub-bass, textured percussion, offbeat grooves, evolving synthscapes, and spatial FX (delay, reverb, modulation), Frequent use of contrast: minimal vs explosive, silence vs impact, analog warmth vs futuristic digital textures, Language & vocals: Bilingual flow (English/Spanish) with global accessibility, Vocals range from melodic, hypnotic singing to rhythmic, charismatic delivery, Focus on identity, tone, and presence over perfection, Artistic direction: Not bound to genres — each track is a world, Design2PublishRemix
tracks.title: Ocean Flow
